heading: Everything your fleet needs, under one roof.
subheading: We handle the paperwork, compliance, and coordination — so you never miss a deadline.

items.title: JPJ Services
items.description: Road tax renewal, vehicle registration, ownership transfers, permits, driving licences, and summon management — all handled directly with JPJ on your behalf.

items.title: APAD Services
items.description: Full assistance with land public transport licensing — new permit applications, renewals, condition changes, age limit extensions, and regulatory appeals.

items.title: Insurance
items.description: Tailored insurance solutions across 13 major partners — motor, commercial vehicle, personal accident, travel, marine, and home & building coverage.

items.title: Puspakom Inspection
items.description: Vehicle inspection coordination to ensure your fleet meets safety and environmental standards — including certification for registration, renewal, and compliance.

items.title: GPS Fleet Tracking
items.description: Enhance fleet security and streamline logistics with real-time GPS tracking — monitor routes, fuel efficiency, and meet commercial vehicle regulatory requirements.

items.title: Consulting & Management
items.description: Strategic fleet consulting for transporters — permit strategy, regulatory navigation, operational planning, and cost optimisation across your entire fleet.
